description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a sharply pointed nose and an angular, streamlined fuselage. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with intricate cutouts and a slightly aggressive downward angle, giving the aircraft a predatory appearance. The body is predominantly a deep blue with subtle gradients and highlights, and a metallic sheen is visible on the surface. A spherical element is integrated near the center, possibly representing an engine or energy core, and the tail section is complex, with multiple fins and angular protrusions. The cockpit is seamlessly blended into the fuselage, with no visible canopy or windows, suggesting an advanced or unmanned design. The overall form is compact and aerodynamic, with no visible landing gear or traditional control surfaces.
description: A sleek, angular blue airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, a pointed nose, and a complex, finned tail. The design is futuristic, with a metallic finish and integrated spherical engine element.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharply pointed nose, symmetrical wing cutouts, and layered fins along the fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swept-back wings, central spherical element, and the elongated, streamlined body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the complex tail structure with multiple fins and the compact, angular rear fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wing cutouts, central sphere, and the detailed tail assembly.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept, angular wings featuring cutouts and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single central spherical engine, type not visibly specified.
attribute_tail_design: Complex tail with multiple vertical and horizontal fins, resembling a hybrid of H-tail and V-tail configurations.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Cockpit is seamlessly integrated into the forward fuselage, with no visible canopy or windows; likely enclosed and single-seat or unmanned.
